reviews.review_title: Too Many Kids Are Being Annoying
reviews.review_description: Hey Remio I Know I Have A Reason Why I Dislike This Game. Too Many Kids Are Being Annoying Flinging People Out Of The Map And Some Kid Called Me “G@y” And Called Me “Bl@ck” When Im Beige And A Male Please Just Dont Let These Kids Be Too Annoying And Toxic Someone Almost Said Hard R And Someone Said That I Suck I Just Dont Like This.

developer_response.body:
Hey Amoory, we're sorry to hear about this experience. Particularly for Spider Fall, our biggest demographic is adolescents, which can turn people off if they have a different expectation from people. That said, abuse and hate speech are never allowed in our apps, and the behavior should be reported immediately.

We do have moderators in the app continually, but we rely on community support as well to make all our apps safe and welcoming. If you have time, I recommend getting to know the moderators through Discord, so you can let them know: https://discord.gg/sG48Hgxd

Also, if you really want to play the game but avoid this group, you're welcome to set up a private server on the main app (Remio), so you can control who you play with completely.

reviews.review_description: The game looks cool but when it says put your email, I did but it didn't let me join 😡

developer_response.body:
Thank you for bringing this to our attention and sorry for the issue! We've already fixed it, so please try again and revisit your review.

- The Remio Team

reviews.review_description: This game has potential but here is the stuff the you could add. Whenever the round ends everyone needs to teleport back to not fall in the acid/lava to not loose a life and cosmetics would be cool. Also whenever your at spawn people can push you off and that is really unfair also if you can add flipping that would be awesome and climbing would be cool like just imagine if you can push people of upside down and if you climb on the wall near the acid your climbing would last at least 15 seconds and on the platforms it would last forever and a content creator badge would be cool and reporting and vote kicking would be cool and moderators in game would be a big help and a tutorial would be good. Also whenever I jump to a platform it takes me to a different direction so nerfing the gravity a little bit would be good.

developer_response.body:
Wow! These are all great suggestions. Thanks for playing and giving this review so much energy!

Good news, cosmetics are coming very soon! So, I'm glad we can take care of that for you.

We also have live moderators in the scene regularly even if you don't see them. Feel free to get their attention by calling out. They aren't in the game 24/7, but they are generally available. Also, you can click on other players to mute them or use the People Tab on the Main Menu. We're always looking for ways to do better though.

We have climbing too! You use the Claw Powerup to do it. I would also love to see flipping, wild suggestion!

Join our Discord community and get to know more about our games! https://discord.gg/peJxBuTt

reviews.review_description: I wasn't expecting much, but this game uses the hand locomotion in this last-spider-standing free-for-all. The spiders are so very cute, it almost breaks my heart to see them fry in lava again and again.
